EMBEDDED_ERROR.TITLE: Unable to load OpenVidu Meet
EMBEDDED_ERROR.MESSAGE: OpenVidu Meet could not be loaded. Please check the embedding configuration.

CLOSED_ROOM.TITLE: Closed room
CLOSED_ROOM.MESSAGE: Meetings in this room are not available while it is closed

ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_DISABLED.TITLE: Anonymous access disabled
ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_DISABLED.MESSAGE: The anonymous access for your role has been disabled in this room (and its recordings)

ANONYMOUS_RECORDING_ACCESS_DISABLED.TITLE: Anonymous access disabled
ANONYMOUS_RECORDING_ACCESS_DISABLED.MESSAGE: The anonymous access for this recording has been disabled

INVALID_ROOM_SECRET.TITLE: Invalid link
INVALID_ROOM_SECRET.MESSAGE: The link you used to access this room (or its recordings) is not valid. Please ask a moderator to share the correct link using the available share buttons

INVALID_RECORDING_SECRET.TITLE: Invalid link
INVALID_RECORDING_SECRET.MESSAGE: The link you used to access this recording is not valid

INVALID_ROOM.TITLE: Invalid room
INVALID_ROOM.MESSAGE: The room (or its recordings) you are trying to access does not exist or has been deleted

INVALID_RECORDING.TITLE: Invalid recording
INVALID_RECORDING.MESSAGE: The recording you are trying to access does not exist or has been deleted

INVALID_MEMBER.TITLE: Invalid member
INVALID_MEMBER.MESSAGE: You are no longer a member of this room or the member information is incorrect

FORBIDDEN_ROOM_ACCESS.TITLE: Forbidden room access
FORBIDDEN_ROOM_ACCESS.MESSAGE: You are not authorized to access this room (nor its recordings)

FORBIDDEN_ROOM_RECORDINGS_ACCESS.TITLE: Forbidden recordings access
FORBIDDEN_ROOM_RECORDINGS_ACCESS.MESSAGE: You are not authorized to access the recordings in this room

FORBIDDEN_RECORDING_ACCESS.TITLE: Forbidden recording access
FORBIDDEN_RECORDING_ACCESS.MESSAGE: You are not authorized to access this recording

ROOM_ACCESS_REVOKED.TITLE: Room access revoked
ROOM_ACCESS_REVOKED.MESSAGE: Your permissions in this room have been changed, and you no longer have access (nor its recordings). Please contact a moderator for more information

TOO_MANY_REQUESTS.TITLE: Too many requests
TOO_MANY_REQUESTS.MESSAGE: You have made too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait a moment and try again

INTERNAL_ERROR.TITLE: Internal error
INTERNAL_ERROR.MESSAGE: An unexpected error occurred, please try again later
